title: EasyClean Sink & Drain Unblocker – 1 Litre Powerful Pipe & Plughole Drain Cleaner Bathroom, Shower,Kitchen & Toilet Sink Unblocker Heavy Duty liquid
features: Drain Unblocker – Powerful formula quickly dissolves grease, hair, soap scum, and food waste, delivering fast and effective blockage removal in minutes.
Sink Unblocker – Ideal for kitchen and bathroom sinks, keeping pipes clear and free-flowing with regular use for ongoing maintenance.
Drain Cleaner – Deep-cleaning action removes build-up and neutralises unpleasant odours, leaving your drains fresh and hygienic.
Toilet Unblocker Heavy Duty – Tough on stubborn clogs yet safe for plumbing, protecting pipes while restoring full flow and preventing future blockages.
Shower Drain Unblocker – Perfect for tackling hair and soap residue in shower and bath plugholes, ensuring smooth water drainage every time.
Sink and Drain Cleaner – Multi-purpose use across the home – suitable for sinks, drains, baths, and showers, offering total drain care in one bottle.
Kitchen Sink Unblocker – Effectively breaks down food waste and grease, keeping your kitchen smelling clean and your pipes clear.
